location: On a corpse behind an illusory wall beneath the entry staircase of Road's End Catacombs in Liurnia of the Lakes.

source.name: Corpse behind illusory wall (Road's End Catacombs)

tactics: From the entrance Site of Grace, go down both staircase flights, turn around, and strike the illusory wall beneath the grassy platform between the stairs
The dungeon is built around seven illusory walls in total, so it's easy to walk past hidden passages without noticing
You don't need to fight through to the dungeon's boss for this pickup — it's in the early illusory-wall section
lore: A large stone staff studded with glintstone shards, wielded by the Erdtree Burial Watchdogs who guard the catacombs; worn down by their long vigil, these watchdogs are said to even command the imps within.

builds.name: Strength build with a ranged option
builds.why: D/D physical scaling plus the built-in Sorcery of the Crozier skill gives a Strength character a colossal weapon with an auto-tracking magic projectile, no Intelligence investment needed.
